summary: Tested new 7-step candidate registration flow with AI-powered OCR document extraction. All backend endpoints working correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend UI displays all 7 steps correctly with proper navigation.
passed_tests: Step 1 - Welcome screen displays correctly with 3 icons and 'Începe acum' button
Step 2 - Document upload shows 4 upload zones (Passport, CV, Diploma, Criminal Record)
Continue button correctly disabled without required uploads (passport + CV)
POST /api/auth/candidate/ocr/passport endpoint exists and returns correct structure
POST /api/auth/candidate/ocr/cv endpoint exists and returns correct structure
Duplicate email registration correctly rejected with 400 error
GET /api/portal/candidate/profile returns profile data for registered candidate
GET /api/auth/me returns correct user data after registration
critical_code_review_comments: CandidateRegisterPage.jsx is well-structured with proper state management and data-testid attributes
OCR service uses Claude AI via emergentintegrations library with proper error handling
Registration endpoint creates both user and candidate_profile in single transaction
Auto-save functionality implemented with localStorage for draft persistence
Profile score calculation implemented with improvement suggestions

test_credentials.note: Tests create unique test accounts with uuid in email

seed_data_creation: Tests create unique candidate accounts for each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: New 7-step candidate registration flow fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/auth/candidate/ocr/passport, /api/auth/candidate/ocr/cv, /api/auth/candidate/register-with-profile all working. Frontend at /register/candidate displays all steps correctly. OCR endpoints may return errors with invalid images (expected behavior per agent_to_agent_context_note).

step_1_welcome.description: Welcome screen with 3 icons (Upload, Verify, Complete) and 'Începe acum' button

step_2_document_upload.description: 4 upload zones for Passport, CV, Diploma, Criminal Record

step_3_ai_processing.description: AI processing animation with progress bar

step_4_confirm_data.description: Confirm extracted data with field status indicators (green/yellow/red)

step_5_fill_missing.description: Fill missing fields including account creation (email/password)

step_6_document_checklist.description: Document checklist with upload buttons for missing documents

step_7_final_confirmation.description: Final confirmation with profile score and submit button

backend_ocr_passport.description: Extracts data from passport image using Claude AI

backend_ocr_cv.description: Extracts data from CV document using Claude AI

backend_register_with_profile.description: Creates user account and candidate profile in one step

backend_profile_access.description: Returns profile data with documents for authenticated candidate

mocked_apis.ANAF_company_lookup: MOCKED in /app/backend/anaf_service.py (not related to this feature)
